calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Marc T. Cefalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANK OF THE WEST.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) TED'S SEPTIC TANKS, INC.; EVERETT SCANLON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $21,942.65
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,755.00
Costs: $744.70
Total Judgment in the amount of $24,442.35
Other: Judgment of possession for plaintiff of the equipment described in Exhibit A. See scanned judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
